title: Professional Logo Design
description: I will design a modern, professional logo for your brand. You get unlimited revisions, vector files (SVG, AI, EPS), PNG, and PDF formats. Perfect for startups and businesses.

title: Full Stack Web Development
description: I will build a complete full stack web application using React, Node.js, and MongoDB. Includes authentication, REST APIs, responsive design, and deployment to your hosting.

title: SEO Content Writing
description: I will write SEO-optimized blog posts, articles, and web content that ranks on Google. Each piece is 100% original, well-researched, and tailored to your audience.

title: Social Media Marketing
description: I will manage your Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter for one month. Includes content creation, scheduling, hashtag research, and weekly performance reports.

title: Mobile App UI/UX Design
description: I will design stunning mobile app screens in Figma with full interactive prototype. Includes 15 screens, component library, design system, and developer handoff files.

title: Python Data Analysis & Visualization
description: I will analyze your dataset using Python (Pandas, NumPy) and create beautiful visualizations with Matplotlib and Seaborn. Includes a full report with insights and recommendations.

title: Video Editing & Post Production
description: Professional video editing for YouTube, Instagram Reels, or corporate videos. Includes color grading, motion graphics, transitions, background music, and subtitles.

title: WordPress Website Setup
description: I will set up a complete WordPress website with a premium theme, essential plugins, contact forms, SEO settings, Google Analytics, and speed optimization.

title: Voice Over Recording
description: Professional voice over in a studio-quality home setup. Perfect for ads, explainer videos, e-learning, podcasts. Includes noise-free WAV and MP3 files with fast turnaround.

title: Business Plan Writing
description: I will write a comprehensive, investor-ready business plan including executive summary, market analysis, financial projections, and competitive analysis. Fully customized for your industry.

title: Instagram Growth Strategy
description: Complete Instagram growth audit and strategy. I'll analyze your account, niche, competitors and create a 30-day content calendar with captions, hashtags, and engagement tactics.

title: React Native App Development
description: I will build a cross-platform mobile app (iOS + Android) using React Native. Includes login, database integration, push notifications, app store submission, and 30 days of support.
